prompt: Create a luxurious Japanese poster advertisement for a fictional premium sake brand named 月白, with the romanized subtitle TSUKISHIRO. The composition is a single refined studio scene with a deep midnight-to-navy blue background and shimmering water-ripple caustics across the top, as if moonlight is reflecting on a still pool. Place one tall frosted glass sake bottle slightly left of center on a glossy black lacquer platform, with a soft cool-white halo behind it. The bottle should be elegant and slender with silver-blue condensation texture, a pale textured paper label, bold black Japanese calligraphy reading 月白, small vertical text near the label edge reading "純米大吟醸", and tiny roman letters "TSUKISHIRO" near the bottom of the label. To the right of the bottle, place one small celadon-green ceramic sake cup on the same platform. Add a realistic plum blossom branch entering from the lower right, carrying approximately 9 open white blossoms and 8 visible buds on dark brown twigs, with a few scattered white petals on the platform and water surface. The surface below should be glossy dark water, showing subtle reflections of the bottle, cup, blossoms, and platform. On the right side, create very large glowing brushstroke Japanese calligraphy reading 月白, stacked vertically, with the spaced serif romanization "TSUKISHIRO" beneath it. On the far left, add one vertical poetic line in Japanese reading 月に酔い、白に還る。. At the bottom center, add the text "純米大吟醸" in pale gray. Include a small white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Lighting should feel cinematic, cool, moonlit, and premium, with minimalism, elegant negative space, high-end beverage advertising aesthetics, Japanese traditional refinement, ultra-detailed textures, crisp product photography realism, and a serene, poetic atmosphere.
